mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `${datatablename}`
`time`,
`id_device`,
`error`,
`low_alarm`,
`high_alarm`,
`Alarm_1`, `Alarm_2`, `Alarm_3`, `Alarm_4`, `Alarm_5`, `Alarm_6`, `Alm_1_Abn_Active_Sched`, `Alm_1_Abn_Reactive_Sched`, `Alm_2_24V_Power_Fail`, `Alm_2_Abn_Cubicle`, `Alm_2_AC_SPD_Fault`, `Alm_2_Device_ID_Conflict`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_1`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_2`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_3`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_4`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_5`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_6`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_7`, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_8`, `Alm_2_MCB_Disconnected`, `Alm_3_License_Expired`, `CO2_Reduced`, `Daily_Yield`, `DI_1`, `DI_2`, `DI_3`, `DI_4`, `DI_5`, `DI_6`, `DI_7`, `DI_8`, `Efficiency`, `Generation_Hrs`, `Ia`, `Ib`, `Ic`, `Locking_Status`, `Plant_Status_Qinghai`, `Plant_Status_Qinghai_2`, `Plant_Status_Shaanxi`, `Power_Factor`, `Total_Active_Power`, `Total_DC_Input_Current`, `Total_DC_Input_Power`, `Total_Rated_Power`, `Total_Reactive_Power`, `Total_Yield`, `Uab`, `Ubc`, `Uca`,
`nvmActivePower`,
`nvmActiveEnergy`,
`MeasuredProduction`,
#{time},
#{id_device},
#{error},
#{low_alarm},
#{high_alarm},
#{Alarm_1}, #{Alarm_2}, #{Alarm_3}, #{Alarm_4}, #{Alarm_5}, #{Alarm_6}, #{Alm_1_Abn_Active_Sched}, #{Alm_1_Abn_Reactive_Sched}, #{Alm_2_24V_Power_Fail}, #{Alm_2_Abn_Cubicle}, #{Alm_2_AC_SPD_Fault}, #{Alm_2_Device_ID_Conflict}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_1}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_2}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_3}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_4}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_5}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_6}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_7}, #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_8}, #{Alm_2_MCB_Disconnected}, #{Alm_3_License_Expired}, #{CO2_Reduced}, #{Daily_Yield}, #{DI_1}, #{DI_2}, #{DI_3}, #{DI_4}, #{DI_5}, #{DI_6}, #{DI_7}, #{DI_8}, #{Efficiency}, #{Generation_Hrs}, #{Ia}, #{Ib}, #{Ic}, #{Locking_Status}, #{Plant_Status_Qinghai}, #{Plant_Status_Qinghai_2}, #{Plant_Status_Shaanxi}, #{Power_Factor}, #{Total_Active_Power}, #{Total_DC_Input_Current}, #{Total_DC_Input_Power}, #{Total_Rated_Power}, #{Total_Reactive_Power}, #{Total_Yield}, #{Uab}, #{Ubc}, #{Uca},
ROUND(#{nvmActivePower}, 2),
ROUND(#{nvmActiveEnergy}, 2),
#{MeasuredProduction},
`id_device` = #{id_device},
`error` = #{error},
`low_alarm` = #{low_alarm},
`high_alarm` = #{high_alarm},
`Alarm_1` = #{Alarm_1}, `Alarm_2` = #{Alarm_2}, `Alarm_3` = #{Alarm_3}, `Alarm_4` = #{Alarm_4}, `Alarm_5` = #{Alarm_5}, `Alarm_6` = #{Alarm_6}, `Alm_1_Abn_Active_Sched` = #{Alm_1_Abn_Active_Sched}, `Alm_1_Abn_Reactive_Sched` = #{Alm_1_Abn_Reactive_Sched}, `Alm_2_24V_Power_Fail` = #{Alm_2_24V_Power_Fail}, `Alm_2_Abn_Cubicle` = #{Alm_2_Abn_Cubicle}, `Alm_2_AC_SPD_Fault` = #{Alm_2_AC_SPD_Fault}, `Alm_2_Device_ID_Conflict` = #{Alm_2_Device_ID_Conflict}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_1` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_1}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_2` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_2}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_3` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_3}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_4` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_4}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_5` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_5}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_6` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_6}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_7` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_7}, `Alm_2_DI_Custom_8` = #{Alm_2_DI_Custom_8}, `Alm_2_MCB_Disconnected` = #{Alm_2_MCB_Disconnected}, `Alm_3_License_Expired` = #{Alm_3_License_Expired}, `CO2_Reduced` = #{CO2_Reduced}, `Daily_Yield` = #{Daily_Yield}, `DI_1` = #{DI_1}, `DI_2` = #{DI_2}, `DI_3` = #{DI_3}, `DI_4` = #{DI_4}, `DI_5` = #{DI_5}, `DI_6` = #{DI_6}, `DI_7` = #{DI_7}, `DI_8` = #{DI_8}, `Efficiency` = #{Efficiency}, `Generation_Hrs` = #{Generation_Hrs}, `Ia` = #{Ia}, `Ib` = #{Ib}, `Ic` = #{Ic}, `Locking_Status` = #{Locking_Status}, `Plant_Status_Qinghai` = #{Plant_Status_Qinghai}, `Plant_Status_Qinghai_2` = #{Plant_Status_Qinghai_2}, `Plant_Status_Shaanxi` = #{Plant_Status_Shaanxi}, `Power_Factor` = #{Power_Factor}, `Total_Active_Power` = #{Total_Active_Power}, `Total_DC_Input_Current` = #{Total_DC_Input_Current}, `Total_DC_Input_Power` = #{Total_DC_Input_Power}, `Total_Rated_Power` = #{Total_Rated_Power}, `Total_Reactive_Power` = #{Total_Reactive_Power}, `Total_Yield` = #{Total_Yield}, `Uab` = #{Uab}, `Ubc` = #{Ubc}, `Uca` = #{Uca},
`nvmActivePower` = ROUND(#{nvmActivePower}, 2),
`nvmActiveEnergy` = ROUND(#{nvmActiveEnergy}, 2),
`MeasuredProduction` = #{MeasuredProduction},
